page: Amazon Web Services r8idn.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance belonging to the r8idn server family. It is built on the Nitro hypervisor and features an x86_64 architecture powered by dedicated Intel processors. The instance provides 32 virtual central processing units across 16 physical cores, with 2.0 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz.

This server configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core. It is equipped with 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes. For connectivity, the instance offers a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps and is optimized for both network and Elastic Block Store performance. It does not include any graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The r8idn.8xlarge offers a high-density memory profile combined with fast local NVMe storage, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring high memory-to-core ratios without the overhead of external storage latency. The combination of dedicated Intel processing, 50 Gbps network baseline, and local SSD storage makes this instance suitable for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, real-time data processing, and enterprise workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idn.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance designed for resource-intensive workloads. Powered by the Nitro hypervisor and dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at 3.9 GHz, this server features 32 vCPUs, 16 physical cores, and 256.0 GB of RAM. It includes 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps. Optimized for both network and EBS performance, the instance lacks GPU accelerators. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, combined with fast local storage, provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound applications. This configuration is suitable for database deployments, memory-intensive enterprise applications, and high-throughput data processing tasks.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring dedicated Intel processors, high-speed local NVMe storage, and high-bandwidth networking for demanding database workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
1900 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage
50 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with EBS optimization
Designed for memory-intensive databases and enterprise applications
